gemini_style_reference_2026_06_23.source: Generated in user's Gemini account in Chrome and saved by user.
gemini_style_reference_2026_06_23.quality_assessment: Usable warm Vietnamese-first social image with clear readable text, human cafe gift moment, visible Wishees.com brand line, and much better emotional/product fit than earlier simple graphic assets.
gemini_style_reference_2026_06_23.limitation: Lower than 1080x1920, so use as quick-post/social reference; request 1080x1920 or upscale before paid ads or sharper video.
gemini_style_reference_2026_06_23.next: Create the next Gemini assets one by one using the same style: group gift, creator mini wishlist, soft birthday, and Pinterest-to-Wishees.

facebook_health_content_2026_06_23.goal: Make the Facebook page feel like an active Wishees page for Vietnamese-first gift moments, not an abandoned legacy page.
ready_posts: Post A - Pinned intro / birthday using Gemini cafe birthday asset
Post B - Baby shower follow-up using existing photo-led MP4
Post E - Wedding / registry supplement using corrected romantic-audio MP4
facebook_health_content_2026_06_23.next: Publish Post A as the next Facebook health post, then Post B after measurement or at least one day. Generate Post C/D assets in Gemini one by one using the prompt queue.

charity_org_wish_safety_2026_06_23.trigger: Side-chat question asked whether to create wishes for a famous organization such as UNICEF and add payment details.
charity_org_wish_safety_2026_06_23.decision: Do not create charity/organization wishes or payment destinations on behalf of any organization without explicit authorization and verified payment ownership.
charity_org_wish_safety_2026_06_23.safe_growth_angle: Use organizer-created community gift lists first: parents, teachers, local groups, or verified organizations. Public copy must clearly identify the organizer and avoid false endorsement.
charity_org_wish_safety_2026_06_23.facebook_application: Added Post F - Community Gift List to the Facebook health plan, but it should run only after normal gift posts are visible.
charity_org_wish_safety_2026_06_23.next: Continue Facebook health with birthday/baby-shower/group-gift content first. Test community gift list later with generic organizer language, not UNICEF/orphanage/poor-people framing.

daily_run_sheet_refresh_2026_06_23.summary: Replaced stale Pinterest/outreach-approval-first guidance with the current Facebook Post 2 publish, measure, and support flow. Batch 2 remains paused; Pinterest/TikTok/YouTube are fallback channels only.
daily_run_sheet_refresh_2026_06_23.next: Use the daily run sheet or localhost publish console as the shortest operating path for the next manual action.
